Welcome

Legacy Pool Service

Legacy Pool Service has been serving Miami and the surrounding region with premium pool service services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Miami Trusts Legacy Pool Service

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →

What We Do

Our Services

From June through November, Miami pools face unique threats from hurricane-force winds and torrential rains. Our proven ...

Algae Prevention & Treatment

South Florida's year-round warmth creates ideal conditions for tenacious algae strains that baffle standard treatments. ...

Smart Pool Upgrades

Pool Deck Resurfacing

Our Difference

The Benefits of Choosing Legacy Pool Service

    Every project completed to the highest standards of excellence

Contact Us →
“
When Hurricane Nicole hit our Coral Gables home, Legacy had our pool secured and drained to the perfect level. After the storm, they were first on-site to remove debris and had our system running before FPL restored power. Their prep saved our vintage 1970s pump from flood damage.
— Marcos R.
